revoke_or_rotate_credentials_steps: remove sandbox Dify credential from workflow
rotate credential if it was exposed outside approved sandbox
do not store replacement credentials in repo
remove_webhook_exposure_steps: confirm no public URL is exposed
confirm Manual Trigger remains the only entry point
audit_logs_to_check: GitHub PR and Actions audit surface
notification provider logs, if accidentally connected
restore_previous_state_steps: remove dry-run test payloads from runtime input storage
preserve redacted evidence for follow-up task
